headline: A Look At Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) Valuation After Resilient First Quarter Earnings And Underwriting Performance
summary: Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) recently reported first quarter 2026 results, with revenue of US$7.23b and net income of US$856m. This has drawn investor attention to underwriting performance and the stock’s recent return profile. See our latest analysis for Hartford Insurance Group. The share price has cooled in the short term, with a 1 day share price return of a 3.7% decline and a 7 day share price return of a 3.85% decline. In contrast, the 1 year total shareholder return of 15.11% and 5...
